fixes.post_fix_expected: Translator Workbench with segment editor + translation memory + save
fixes.evidence_desktop: Header 'Translation workbench' with pencil icon + subtitle 'Review pending strings and publish translations for tenants using your target locale.' Status filter tabs (All / Pending / In review / Approved). Purple 'Translation memory' panel: '5 similar phrases translated previously. Open suggestions.' PENDING STRINGS (6) table with columns Key / Source (en) / Target locale / Status / Action — rows show common.save_changes (he-IL, Pending), booking.confirm_reminder (he-IL, In review), error.generic_retry (he-IL, Pending), pricing.save_annual (fr-FR, Pending), nav.my_subscription (fr-FR, Approved), billing.next_bill_date (he-IL, In review). Each row has blue 'Translate' CTA. Footer 'My translations today: 1 completed.' Not a deny page.
fixes.evidence_tablet: Same workbench layout, responsive column adjustments (Target locale column wraps). All 6 pending strings + Translation memory + status tabs + Translate CTAs present.
fixes.evidence_mobile: Workbench content rendered but constrained to ~half viewport width (content does not fill mobile screen). Header 'Translation workbench', status tabs, Translation memory panel, 6-row pending strings table with Translate CTAs all present. Mobile layout overflow is a cosmetic issue — content is correct.
fixes.notes: Mobile viewport renders content in left half of screen only (layout width issue, not a content/role-branch issue). Core fix verified: translator gets purpose-built workbench, not deny.

Three ticket cards in row: VIP TICKET Annual Tech Summit 2026 (Apr 28 2026, Moscone West, TKT-20260428-001, QR placeholder, 'View ticket' CTA); GENERAL TICKET Bay Area Product Leaders Meetup (May 15 2026, The Midway SF, TKT-20260515-042); EARLY BIRD TICKET DesignSystems Live 2026 (Jun 01 2026, Yerba Buena Center, TKT-20260601-117). All cards show QR code placeholder + View ticket CTA.
evidence_desktop.event-organiser: SCANNER / CHECK-IN KIOSK — 'Check-in kiosk — Annual Tech Summit 2026' header + 'Scan attendee QR codes or enter ticket codes to check guests in.' 3 metrics cards: CHECKED IN 142/250 attendees, REMAINING 108 expected, PROGRESS 57% with green bar. RECENT CHECK-INS list: Priya Rao (VIP, 10:42 AM, green check), Marcus Chen (General, 10:41 AM), Elena Novak (VIP, 10:39 AM). Left sidebar shows Events/Attendance nav.
evidence_desktop.platform-admin: SETTLEMENT / PAYOUT ADMIN — 'Ticket payments overview' header + subtitle 'Cross-tenant settlement + refund queue. Tickets are issued via Stripe Connect.' 3 metric cards: TOTAL TRANSACTIONS TODAY 1,247 (+12% vs yesterday), REFUND QUEUE 8 pending (Requires review), DISPUTED TRANSACTIONS 2 (Stripe dispute window open). 'Recent refunds' table with columns TXN/EVENT/AMOUNT/REASON/STATUS/ACTION — 3 rows (TXN-88421 $295 Event rescheduled pending, TXN-88410 $125 Duplicate charge pending, TXN-88397 $85 Attendee cancellation pending) each with green 'Approve' + grey 'Deny' CTAs. 'Open Stripe payments console' link. Platform-admin sidebar includes Designer, Flow Library, Run Flow, Super Agent, Generation Lab, Model Leaderboard, Prompt Lab, Quality Dashboard — clearly platform level.
